seoTitle: How to Change a Square Picture to a Circle in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to turn a square image into a circular one in Canva using the shape tool, then resize, position, and export it for a polished look.
intro: Circular images give social graphics and marketing materials a more modern feel than a plain square crop. This guide covers uploading a square photo into Canva, applying the shape tool to make it circular, and positioning it correctly before exporting. It's aimed at anyone who wants a quick, repeatable technique for shaping images without complex photo editing software.

steps.heading: Upload your square picture
steps.body: Bring your square image into Canva as the starting point for the shape conversion.

steps.heading: Apply the shape tool
steps.body: Use Canva's shape tool to crop the square image into a circle.

steps.heading: Resize and position the circular image
steps.body: Adjust the size and placement of the newly circular image so it fits your design layout.

steps.heading: Customize borders and effects
steps.body: Add borders or effects to the circular image for a more polished, finished look before exporting.

faq.question: Can I turn any square image into a circle in Canva?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva's shape tool can crop most square images into a circular shape without needing separate photo editing software.

faq.question: Does cropping a square image to a circle affect quality?
faq.answer: Following the resizing and positioning steps helps maintain image quality, though very small source images may lose some detail after cropping.

faq.question: Why would I want a circular image instead of a square one?
faq.answer: Circular images are often used for social media graphics and marketing materials because they give designs a more polished, modern look.

faq.question: Can I add a border to the circular image?
faq.answer: Yes, once the image is cropped to a circle you can customize borders and effects for a more finished appearance.
